laws.title: Public Law 24-178 | Equality in Employment Act
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Replace 'sex, or national origin' with 'sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, or national origin' in 42 U.S.C. 2000e-2(a)(1) and (a)(2).
laws.chronology_conclusion: Chronology points to Title 42 section 2000e-2 as the executable home, and the act is already incorporated there; no later law in this review displaces that Title 42 amendment.
source_evidence: codification/mass_migration/latest/reports/laws/PL-024-178.md classifies the act as ALREADY_INCORPORATED and cites 42 U.S.C. 2000e-2.
audit/chronology-report.json groups the law to /us/usc/t42/s2000e-2.
usc/usc42.xml contains the amended text and the Pub. L. 24-178 amendment note.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch text in usc/usc42.xml includes the added protected classes; origin/main does not show that Title 42 amendment, and usc/usc29.xml does not show a matching PL-024-178 note on text search.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep the Title 42 amendment, and clean up any stale or mis-anchored codification note handling.
